items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
items.chinese_summary: （AI 摘要生成失败）OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
items.chinese_summary: （AI 摘要生成失败）OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.original_summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.
items.chinese_summary: （AI 摘要生成失败）Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.original_summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
items.chinese_summary: （AI 摘要生成失败）Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.chinese_summary: （AI 摘要生成失败）OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.original_summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.original_summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
items.chinese_summary: （AI 摘要生成失败）Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.original_summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.chinese_summary: （AI 摘要生成失败）OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.original_summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
